---
title: "Webinars"
subtitle: "Online learning sessions by industry experts"
description: "Join free webinars on cybersecurity, cloud computing, AI, software development, and digital transformation led by industry experts."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Online <span class="gr">Webinars</span></h1>
    <p>Free, expert-led sessions on cybersecurity, cloud, AI, and digital transformation. Join from anywhere.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Upcoming webinars</h2>
    <p class="sub">Live sessions with Q&A. Register to save your spot.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i><h3>Zero Trust Security</h3><p>Principles, implementation strategies, and real-world case studies. 90 min.</p><a href="/academy/webinars/pages/zero-trust-security.html" class="m-lk">View details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud"></i><h3>Cloud Cost Optimization</h3><p>Identify waste, implement governance, and maximize cloud ROI. 60 min.</p><a href="/academy/webinars/pages/cloud-cost-optimization.html" class="m-lk">View details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-robot"></i><h3>AI Ethics</h3><p>Responsible AI, privacy, fairness, and transparency in practice. 120 min.</p><a href="/academy/webinars/pages/ai-ethics-developers.html" class="m-lk">View details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><h3>Cyber Awareness</h3><p>New-school security awareness training with KnowBe4. 90 min.</p><a href="/academy/webinars/pages/modern-web-development.html" class="m-lk">View details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i><h3>Digital Transformation</h3><p>Framework for leading technology change in your organization. 75 min.</p><a href="/academy/webinars/pages/digital-transformation.html" class="m-lk">View details</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Recurring series</h2>
    <p class="sub">Regular sessions you can count on.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>Security First</h3><p>Monthly deep dives into cybersecurity practices, threat intelligence, and security architecture. First Tuesday, 60 min.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud-arrow-up"></i><h3>Cloud Mastery</h3><p>Cloud technologies, architecture patterns, and operational best practices across major platforms. Monthly, 90 min.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-heart-pulse"></i><h3>Cyber Hygiene</h3><p>Weekly sessions covering procedures, frameworks, and cybersecurity methodologies. Every Wednesday, 60 min.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Past webinars</h2>
    <p class="sub">Recordings coming soon.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-collection-play"></i><h3>Cyber Awareness Best Practices</h3><p>Cybersecurity and risk management with Chenist, KnowBe4, and the Romanian Cybersecurity Office (DNSC). March 2025.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-collection-play"></i><h3>Data Privacy Compliance</h3><p>Global data privacy regulations and practical compliance approaches. February 2025.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Never miss a webinar</h2>
    <p>Subscribe for announcements, tech insights, and exclusive content.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank" class="m-b">Subscribe to updates</a>
      <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b-ghost">Book a call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
